---
description: "Use when editing README, docs, or other Markdown documentation. Covers English-only documentation, concise style, and keeping docs in sync with implementation."
name: "Documentation Maintenance"
applyTo: "README.md, **/README.md, docs/**/*.md, .github/**/*.md"
---
# Documentation Maintenance

- Keep documentation in English only.
- Keep documentation concise, direct, and non-repetitive.
- Update affected documentation in the same change when behavior, architecture, workflows, or commands change.
- Remove or rewrite outdated statements instead of appending contradictory notes.
- Prefer linking to a single source of truth instead of duplicating the same explanation across files.
